name: Basic Granita Formula
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar and water. Bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
2. Let cool. Stir in the fruit juice and lemon juice.
3. Pour into a chilled 13 by 9 inch metal baking dish.
4. Place in the freezer. Stir every 30 minutes until the mixture is firm.
Yield: 4 cups
